examples: He felt very strange and asked the sculptor, "Why are you making two same sculptures?"
Undeterred, he crept into the cemetery under the cloak of darkness with a bemused sculptor in tow.
I know a sculptor who swaps her pieces for drawings by a well-known artist.
The Animals in War Memorial was designed by English sculptor David Backhouse and unveiled in 2004.
The statue, designed by sculptor Les Johnson, stands at the junction of King and Queen streets.
